description_cn:
刚体是指在运动中和受力作用后，形状和大小不变，而且内部各点的相对位置不变的物体。

平面默认状态下就是XY平面。

强度默认值为10.
description_en:
A rigid body is an object whose shape and size remain unchanged during motion and after being subjected to forces, and whose relative positions of all points within it remain unchanged.

The default plane is the XY plane.

The default strength value is 10.

parameters.name: Plane
parameters.desc_cn: 刚体的初始平面。如果未提供，则将使用位于质心处的 XY 对齐平面。
parameters.desc_en: The initial frame of the body. If none supplied, an XY aligned plane at the centroid will be used

outputs.name: P
outputs.desc_en: The planes of the rigid bodies

author: Kangaroo Team
